basic_details.job_title: Sangli DCC Bank Clerk Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 444 Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Sangli District Central Co‑operative Bank Ltd., Sangli has opened online applications for Clerk (Junior Assistant) Recruitment 2026, offering a total of 444 vacancies for graduates across Sangli District. The application window opened on 24 June 2026 and closes on 8 July 2026, making this a time‑sensitive opportunity for local job seekers. Eligible candidates must apply online via the bank’s careers portal and meet the specified educational, domicile, and age criteria to be considered for the two‑stage selection process (online exam followed by personal interview). If you’re a Sangli domic

age_limit.details: Age eligibility is calculated as of a specific reference date. Here's what you need to know: | Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 35 years Reference Date: 20/06/2026 Candidates must have been born not earlier than 21/06/1991 to be eligible. | Age relaxation, if any, will be governed by applicable rules; candidates should check the official notification for the latest updates.

qualification.details: Understanding the eligibility criteria is the first step before applying. This section covers educational qualifications, domicile requirements, and other key conditions. | To be considered for the Junior Assistant role, candidates must fulfil all of the following conditions as on the date of application: | A graduate degree in any discipline from a recognized university. Additionally, candidates must hold an MS-CIT certificate or an equivalent computer course recognized by the Government of Maharashtra (as per Govt. letter no. 277/39 dated 4 Feb. 2013). Accepted equivalents include D.O.A.C.C. and N.E.I.L.L.I.T. New Delhi certificates. Exception: Candidates who are Graduates or Post-Graduates in Computer Science / Information Technology (IT) are exempt from the MS-CIT requirement. | Domicile of Sangli District is mandatory. Candidates must submit a valid domicile certificate at the time of application. As per a Maharashtra Government resolution dated 08/05/2026, 70% of seats are reserved for Sangli District domiciles and 30% are open for candidates from other districts. However, if candidates from other districts are unavailable, those seats will be filled from Sangli domiciles.

vacancy_details.Information: Sangli District Central Co-operative Bank Ltd.

post_wise_breakdown.information: Sangli District Central Co-operative Bank Ltd.

salary_details.details: One of the most searched queries around this recruitment is the salary structure. Here's a breakdown: | During the 12-month probation period, selected clerks will receive a monthly stipend of ₹22,000/-. After successful completion of probation, the candidate will be placed in the bank's regular Clerk grade and will receive full emoluments as per the bank clerk pay scale. | Confirmation into regular service will depend on satisfactory assessment of work performance, attendance records, and confidential reports during the probation period. | Calculate your exact in-hand Salary in 10 seconds - Calculate Now

selection_process: The selection process for the Junior Assistant post involves two stages. Understanding this process helps candidates prepare strategically.
Stage 1: Online Examination All shortlisted applicants will appear for an online computer-based test.
Stage 2: Personal Interview Candidates who meet the cut-off in the online exam and whose educational documents are verified will be called for a personal interview conducted at Sangli.
The final merit list will be prepared in descending order based on scores obtained across both stages combined.

exam_pattern.details: The online examination structure is clearly defined, covering multiple subject areas. Here's the complete pattern: | Key Points: | The exam will be conducted in English and Marathi only. There is negative marking- 0.25 marks will be deducted for each wrong answer. Unanswered questions carry no penalty. Minimum qualifying marks: 50% (i.e., 45 out of 90) to be shortlisted for the interview. The bank reserves the right to revise the cut-off.

_labels.apply_online: Apply Online for Sangli DCC Bank Clerk Recruitment 2026

faq.question: Q1. What is the total number of vacancies in Sangli DCC Bank Clerk Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are 444 vacancies for the post of Clerk (Junior Assistant) in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for Sangli DCC Bank Clerk 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application and pay the fee is 08 July 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application fee for Sangli DCC Bank Junior Assistant 2026?
faq.answer: The application fee is ₹1,180/- (₹1,000 + 18% GST) for all categories. This fee is non-refundable.

faq.question: Q4. Is MS-CIT mandatory for Sangli DCC Bank Clerk Recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, MS-CIT or an equivalent recognized computer certificate is required. However, graduates or post-graduates in Computer Science or IT are exempt from this requirement.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for Sangli DCC Bank Clerk 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must be between 18 and 35 years of age as on 20/06/2026 (born not before 21/06/1991).

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary of a Clerk in Sangli DCC Bank?
faq.answer: During the probation period of 12 months, clerks receive a monthly stipend of ₹22,000/-. After confirmation, they receive pay as per the bank's clerk pay scale.

faq.question: Q7. Is domicile certificate of Sangli mandatory?
faq.answer: Yes, a valid Sangli District domicile certificate is mandatory for all applicants.

faq.question: Q8. Where will the Sangli DCC Bank Clerk exam be held?
faq.answer: The online exam will be held at four centres: Sangli, Kolhapur, Satara, and Pune. Centre allocation is at the bank's discretion.

faq.question: Q9. Is there negative marking in the Sangli DCC Bank Clerk exam?
faq.answer: Yes, 0.25 marks will be deducted for every wrong answer. Unattempted questions carry no penalty.

faq.question: Q10. How can I download the Sangli DCC Bank Clerk Admit Card 2026?
faq.answer: Hall tickets will be available on sanglidccb.bank.in/career 7–10 days before the exam date. Candidates will need their registration number and date of birth to access it.
